cliApiToken.description: Shared secret for CLI authentication. Auto-generated if not set. ENV: CLI_API_TOKEN

apiUrl.description: Hub URL for CLI connections. ENV: AGENTCHAT_API_URL

listenHost.description: Hub HTTP bind address. ENV: AGENTCHAT_LISTEN_HOST

publicUrl.description: Public URL for browser or PWA access. ENV: AGENTCHAT_PUBLIC_URL

vapidKeys.description: Auto-generated Web Push VAPID keys. Do not edit manually.

machineId.description: Auto-generated unique machine identifier. Do not edit manually.

machineIdConfirmedByServer.description: Internal flag. Do not edit manually.

runnerAutoStartWhenRunningAgentChat.description: Auto-start runner when running the AgentChat CLI.
